name: Alanosine
description: An amino acid analogue and antibiotic derived from the bacterium Streptomyces alanosinicus with antimetabolite and potential antineoplastic activities.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in brain cancer and cancer/tumors (unspecified).
mechanismOfAction: L-alanosine inhibits adenylosuccinate synthetase, which converts inosine monophospate (IMP) into adenylosuccinate, an intermediate in purine metabolism. L-alanosine-induced disruption of de novo purine biosynthesis is potentiated by methylthioadenosine phosphorylase (MTAP) deficiency.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Alanosine.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Alanosine.

interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Alanosine.

interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Alanosine.
